message:
feat(cass): add session quality scoring module

Implements meta_skill-llm (Session Quality Scoring) which gates pattern
extraction to high-signal sessions only.

- SessionQuality struct with score (0.0-1.0), signals, and missing diagnostics
- MissingSignal enum: NoTestsPassed, NoUserConfirmation, NoClearResolution,
  NoCodeChanges, TooShort, TooLong
- QualityConfig with configurable weights and thresholds (default min_score: 0.3)
- Signal detection: tests_passed, clear_resolution, code_changes,
  user_confirmed, backtracking, abandoned
- Comprehensive unit tests for all signal detection methods

This unblocks the Pattern Extraction Pipeline (meta_skill-237) and
9 downstream issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
